subcodes.first_line: O Ghaffar! God willing, mayest thou ever be remembered before God and, in all worlds, circle round His good-pleasure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای غفار انشاء الله لم یزل عند الله مذکور باشی و در جمیع عوالم حول رضایش طائف
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement
